title: Trifling Women
actors: Barbara La Marr, Ramon Novarro, Pomeroy Cannon
plot: To teach his fickle daughter, Jacqueline, the dangers of faithlessness, novelist Léon de Séverac reads her his latest story: In maneuvering for the favors of Zareda, a captivating Parisian adventuress, Baron de Maupin sends his so...
